seed.quote: "AI generates full articles by combining 4-5 KUs": rejected as generate-then-filter; output coherent but insight-free.

companion.quote: Seed -> agent-evidence-assembly -> genre-template outline; the human writes only the opinionated/quotable paragraphs.

question: Your recorded pipeline puts the judgment gate at the interview, which the rejected pattern lacked entirely — does that boundary still hold when a run assembles seventeen facts before the gate, or does volume alone move a run toward the pattern you declined?
